generated_exposure.exposure_text: I've seen firsthand how expanded security powers have kept our communities safe. The new measures aren't about control - they're about giving law enforcement the tools they need to stop threats before they happen. My neighbor's granddaughter was targeted by extremists last year, and the early intervention saved her life. We can't afford to wait until it's too late. #SecurityFirst #ProtectOurCommunities
